overview: Goblin Bolaslinger is a Normal-class Humanoid/Beast monster found in Goblin Cave. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 0 HP, 11 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 3. 6 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack1 at 260% ratio (286 base damage). Sight range 900, combat radius 450. Nightmare gains 3 exclusive abilityies: Attack1 Nightmare, Attack2 Nightmare, Attack3 Nightmare.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 6 melee attacks. Attack1 (260%), Attack2 (260%), Attack3 (260%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Attack1 (260% ratio)
strategies.description: Attack1 deals 286 damage at base (260% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Attack1 Nightmare, Attack2 Nightmare, Attack3 Nightmare
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 3 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Attack1 Nightmare, Attack2 Nightmare, Attack3 Nightmare. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 900 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 900 units, loses target at 1800 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 450, ability check distance 550
strategies.description: Combat area radius 450. Ability check distance 550. Ability attack delay: 0.8s.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 3 exclusive abilities: Attack1 Nightmare, Attack2 Nightmare, Attack3 Nightmare

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 900 units. Loses target at 1800 units.
